name: Muhammad
title: THE FINAL MESSENGER
subtitle: Sent as a mercy to the worlds, the final Prophet received the Quran and established the path of perfect character and devotion to the One Creator.

name: Adam
subtitle: The first human and Prophet, created from clay and honored with divine knowledge in the Garden of Eden.

name: Nuh
subtitle: The patient caller who built the Ark by divine command to save the believers from the Great Flood.

name: Ibrahim
subtitle: The Friend of Allah, father of Prophets, and the one who rebuilt the Kaaba with his son Isma'il.

name: Musa
subtitle: The one who spoke with Allah on Mount Sinai and led the Children of Israel out of Egyptian tyranny.

name: Isa
subtitle: The Messiah born of Maryam, who performed great miracles by Allah's leave and brought the Injeel.

name: Yusuf
subtitle: The Prophet of beauty and patience, whose life journey from the well to the throne is the best of stories.

name: Ayyub
subtitle: The pinnacle of patience, who remained steadfast in his devotion through years of illness and loss.

name: Yunus
subtitle: The companion of the whale, whose sincere repentance within the deep darkness brought divine salvation.

name: Idris
subtitle: The ancient Prophet known for his wisdom, truthfulness, and his mastery of writing and science.
